title: botrychium matricarianum
intro: Botrychium matricarianum, also known as grape fern or matricaria fern, is a rare and unusual species of fern found in North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Botrychium matricarianum are said to include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
